exampleSentences.sentence: The doctor gave me a tablet for the pain.
exampleSentences.gujaratiTranslation: ડૉક્ટરે મને દુખાવા માટે ગોળી આપી.
exampleSentences.hindiTranslation: डॉक्टर ने मुझे दर्द के लिए एक गोली दी।

exampleSentences.sentence: The child was afraid of the injection.
exampleSentences.hindiTranslation: बच्चा इंजेक्शन से डर रहा था।

exampleSentences.sentence: He put a bandage on the cut.
exampleSentences.hindiTranslation: उसने कट पर एक पट्टी બાંધી।

exampleSentences.sentence: Daily exercise is good for health.
exampleSentences.gujaratiTranslation: રોજિંદી કસરત સ્વાસ્થ્ય માટે સારી છે.
exampleSentences.hindiTranslation: रोजाना व्यायाम स्वास्थ्य के लिए अच्छा है।
